'''hangaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nichromite|nichromite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ng-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nichromite|nichromite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hangaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hængægæth|hængægæth]] || [[word:hængægæj|hængægæj]] || [[word:hængægæsh|hængægæsh]] || [[word:hængægæ|hængægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hangangagath|hangangagath]] || [[word:hangangagaj|hangangagaj]] || [[word:hangangagash|hangangagash]] || [[word:hangangaga|hangangaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hangagath|hangagath]] || [[word:hangagaj|hangagaj]] || [[word:hangagash|hangagash]] || [[word:hangaga|hangaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hangafgath|hangafgath]] || [[word:hangafgaj|hangafgaj]] || [[word:hangafgash|hangafgash]] || [[word:hangafgaf|hangafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hangagatha|hangagatha]] || [[word:hangagaja|hangagaja]] || [[word:hangagasha|hangagasha]] || [[word:hangagaka|hangagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hangagath|hangagath]] || [[word:hangagaj|hangagaj]] || [[word:hangagash|hangagash]] || [[word:hangaga|hangaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hangagathal|hangagathal]] || [[word:hangagajal|hangagajal]] || [[word:hangagashal|hangagashal]] || [[word:hangagakal|hangagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hangagathatha|hangagathatha]] || [[word:hangagajaja|hangagajaja]] || [[word:hangagashasha|hangagashasha]] || [[word:hangagaka|hangagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hangagathan|hangagathan]] || [[word:hangagajan|hangagajan]] || [[word:hangagashan|hangagashan]] || [[word:hangagakan|hangagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hangagathaoro|hangagathaoro]] || [[word:hangagajaoro|hangagajaoro]] || [[word:hangagashaoro|hangagashaoro]] || [[word:hangagakaoro|hangagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
